_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Sandbox (S&Box) Server
author: team@gameforge.gg
description: S&Box dedicated server using a custom runtime image with baked Wine + Windows .NET, while SteamCMD is installed by the egg installer and server files are managed at runtime.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

mkdir -p /mnt/server /mnt/server/steamcmd /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /tmp
rm -f steamcmd.tar.gz
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd --no-same-owner
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
chown -R root:root /mnt || true
export HOME=/mnt/server

./steamcmd.sh +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "SteamCMD installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: Map
variables.description: Optional map package identifier passed after +game

variables.name: Local Project (.sbproj)
variables.description: Optional .sbproj target for +game. Project files must be inside /home/container/projects/; pass only folder/file (for example: richman/richman.sbproj).

variables.name: Extra Args
variables.description: Optional extra command line arguments appended to sbox-server.exe

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set to 1 to run SteamCMD app_update on startup, 0 to skip

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch (for example: staging)

variables.name: Windows .NET Version
variables.description: Windows .NET runtime version baked into the runtime image
